discussion.p: It does not appear that any of the class templates in <simd> can be profitably specialized by the user – or that the non-member functions can be used with such user specializations.

li.p: Add the following paragraph to the end of :

p.ins: -?- If a program declares an explicit or partial specialization of any of the templates specified in subclause , the program is ill-formed, no diagnostic required.

p.del: -3- The behavior of a program that adds specializations for `alignment` is undefined.
